layout.spacing_philosophy: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards to let data breathe.
layout.grid_mode: Control Room Grid. Dense, strict hierarchy. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
layout.borders: Exposed skeleton. 1px solid border-white/10 everywhere. No soft shadows.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#E5FE40] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#D4ED31] rounded-sm px-6 py-2 font-bold transition-colors. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.
components.inputs: bg-transparent border border-white/20 rounded-sm focus:border-[#E5FE40] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E5FE40] px-3 py-2 text-white placeholder-gray-500
components.table: border-collapse w-full. th: text-left uppercase text-xs tracking-[0.2em] text-gray-400 border-b border-white/10 py-4. td: border-b border-white/5 py-4 text-sm font-mono.
components.badges: px-2 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest border rounded-none flex items-center w-max

login_background.description: Abstract neon yellow LED matrix over black frosted glass

empty_state_illustration.description: Minimalist line-art illustration of an empty folder

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-job-button')

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts in index.html or import in CSS: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono.
Apply Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted to dark mode.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or rounded corners larger than 2px (rounded-sm). Maintain a sharp, technical look.
Override default Shadcn styles to remove radius and use border-white/10.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for login background and empty states. Overlay login_background with bg-black/80 for contrast.
Ensure the dashboard utilizes a 'Control Room' grid layout (Mode B) ensuring density and clear visual hierarchy.
